Our Story

Clean Homes.
Confident Families.

Paavit was born from a simple belief — every Indian home deserves cleaning products that work brilliantly, smell beautiful, and never compromise on safety. We're not just another FMCG label; we're your partner in everyday care.

Explore Products Partner With Us
Premium Quality Tested & Certified
Who We Are

Redefining Cleanliness for the Modern Home

At Paavit, we believe a clean home is the foundation of a healthy, happy family. Born out of a desire to create powerful cleaning agents without the harsh toxic footprint, we've developed a premium line of FMCG products — from floor cleaners and detergents to fragrant handwashes.

Through rigorous manufacturing excellence and quality assurance, every bottle of Paavit guarantees performance you can trust — day in and day out, across kitchens, bathrooms, living spaces, and beyond.

Our Mission

To deliver uncompromising hygiene with skin-safe, eco-conscious chemistry that every family can rely on.

Our Vision

To be India's most trusted home care brand — known for innovation, consistency, and care in every pour.

Our Promise

Everyday Cleaning. Everyday Care. — powerful results without harsh compromises, for homes that feel as good as they look.

What Drives Us

Built on Four Pillars

Every formula, every fragrance, and every pack size is designed around the values that define Paavit.

Science-Backed

Advanced stain-removal and germ-kill technology tested for real-world Indian homes.

Skin-Safe

Tough on dirt, gentle on hands and surfaces — free from unnecessarily harsh chemicals.

Made in India

Proudly manufactured with rigorous QA, from our Mumbai base to households nationwide.

Partner First

From retail shelves to hotel housekeeping — we grow alongside the businesses that trust us.

Our Journey

From Idea to Every Shelf

A growing story of quality, trust, and homes that shine a little brighter every day.

01

The Spark

Frustrated by harsh cleaners that worked but worried families, we set out to formulate something better — effective, fragrant, and genuinely safe for daily use.

02

First Product Line

Our core home care range launched — floor cleaner, detergent, toilet cleaner, and dish wash — each engineered for Indian water, surfaces, and routines.

03

Soft Wash Collection

Three signature handwash fragrances — Ice Blast, Orange, and Strawberry — brought premium personal care into the Paavit family.

04

Scaling Up

5 litre cans for hotels, hostels, and institutions — plus combo offers and subscriptions so partners save more as they grow with us.

0+

Happy Families

0+

Retail Partners

0

Premium Products

0%

Quality Tested

Our Craft

Quality in Every Bottle

From raw ingredients to the final label — every step is held to a standard we'd use in our own homes.

Lab Tested

Each batch passes stringent quality checks for pH balance, efficacy, and safety before it reaches you.

Conscious Formulas

We prioritise biodegradable surfactants and responsible packaging wherever possible.

Two Pack Sizes

1 litre bottles for everyday retail and 5 litre cans for commercial scale — same trusted formula in both.

Join the Paavit Family

Ready to Experience the Difference?

Browse our full collection or reach out for distributorship, bulk orders, and custom quotes.
